name: Run seed migration (production + staging Sanity datasets)
description: Seed the 4 not-yet-Sanity-wired email templates + emailPrivacyExport doc-types so editor surfaces have content on first publish.

name: Worker-bundle sourcemap upload to Sentry (BLOCKED upstream)
description: Blocked on sentry-javascript#19213. sentry-cli sourcemaps inject/upload succeeds against .open-next/worker.js[.map] but runtime stack frames don't reference uploaded Debug IDs because something in OpenNext's worker init strips them. Server-side stack traces from Sentry.withSentry reach Sentry minified. Acceptable tradeoff — error.digest provides per-error correlation; client-side captures are symbolicated.

name: Apply production D1 migrations 0004 → 0012
description: Staging D1 is at 0012 (verified 2026-05-19); production stuck at 0003. 9 migrations introduce every gift-aware column (is_gift, purchaser_user_id, recipient_email, gift_delivery_method, gift_send_at, gift_message, gift_claim_token_hash, gift_claim_email_fired_at, gift_claimed_at, gift_cancelled_at, gift_resend_lock_until) + 0012's 5 audit columns + UNIQUE partial idx (gift_claim_sent_now_at, gift_claim_sent_now_actor, gift_claim_prior_alarm_at, gift_cancelled_by, gift_cancelled_reason, idx_gift_sent_now_once). If main-merge happens without applying, production worker throws at first gift-aware code path. Order: (1) pnpm migrate:list:staging confirm 0012, (2) pnpm migrate:apply:prod (CLI applies pending in lexicographic order), (3) pnpm migrate:list:prod confirm all 12, (4) wrangler d1 execute withjosephine_bookings --remote --command "PRAGMA table_info(submissions);" spot-check. 0012 alone (idempotent ALTER + CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS) is safe standalone.

name: PR #86 simplify-deferred refactors (3 items)
description: (a) defaults-merge convention across Hero/HowItWorks/Footer/Navigation. (b) Resend EmailSendResult discriminated union. (c) scripts/_lib/sanity-write-client.mts helper extraction.

name: Dry-run CSV mode
description: Walks submissions WHERE is_gift = 1 AND status = 'paid', flags any with recipient_user_id != purchaser_user_id mismatch chain consistent with the bb5fe157 vector. Emits CSV (submission_id, current recipient_user_id, proposed recipient_user_id, evidence). No writes.

name: Extract SANDBOX_EMAIL_PREFIXES to shared module
description: src/lib/resend.tsx:108 defines sandbox-prefix list as source of truth for dry-run guard. Spec files (gift/listen/stripe/v120-smoke/gift-recipient-listen-roundtrip.spec.ts) each hardcode the matching prefix as raw string. A spec rename OR new spec following slightly different prefix convention silently re-opens the Resend quota leak with zero test failure. Fix: move SANDBOX_EMAIL_PREFIXES + SANDBOX_DOMAIN to new module src/lib/booking/sandboxEmails.ts (worker-safe, no test deps). Import from both src/lib/resend.tsx and spec files; build email addresses as `${SANDBOX_EMAIL_PREFIXES.giftRoundtripPurchaser}${randomUUID()}${SANDBOX_DOMAIN}`. Then typo/rename at any callsite breaks at TypeScript compile.

name: Node 22 → 24 upgrade
description: Pinned in .github/actions/setup/action.yml:13 + .github/workflows/e2e.yml:80 + wrangler compat_date. Target before 2026-10-21 (Node 22 maintenance EOL).

name: R2 — delete orphaned submission objects (or wait for reaper)
description: Bucket withjosephine-booking-photos → delete objects under submissions/<id>/ for deleted IDs. Or wait for orphan-reaper cron. Sanity asset orphans from listen-roundtrip are LOW priority (deduped by SHA-1; <10KB total).

name: U8 — Claimed-vs-paid status decision
description: Decision needed: add new submission status enum value 'claimed_awaiting_delivery', OR compute claimed-vs-paid from giftClaimedAt presence (no schema churn). Currently the two states are conflated under 'paid'.

name: Phase 4 — production secrets + R2 lifecycle
description: Phase 4 code is in production (PR #130 merged 2026-05-17); vendor helpers ship flag-off-by-absence and cascade reports vendorNotConfigured partial-failures until env vars populated. Production-only Max-actions to turn vendor calls on. Staging secrets already in place. Run from www/ with the production Cloudflare Workers binding (no --env flag).

name: U8 — Surface giftClaimedAt in submissions list/preview
description: giftClaimedAt is in schema (Sub-PR β #160) but not in deskStructure list/preview. Becky has no at-a-glance claimed signal.

name: Pentester audit on the PR diff
description: 27 files, +972/-23. Webhook-secret + admin-token surfaces touched. Standard Phase 7 audit checklist.

name: Studio iframe — preview smoke test (S.view.component)
description: Slot-validation + preview iframe was the main load-bearing UX piece. Smoke each of the 10 email types: render with placeholders + render with seeded copy.

name: Mirror repair to Sanity
description: After D1 UPDATE, patch the mirrored Sanity submission doc's recipient.user._ref so /my-gifts queries see the corrected binding.

name: Magic-link email subject + body neutralization or context-routing
description: studio/schemas/emailMagicLink.ts:12,19,33-37 defaults subject + preview + body to reading-centric language. src/app/api/auth/magic-link/route.ts:42-43 fires same template regardless of 'next' destination. A purchaser hitting /my-gifts → 'Send link' gets 'open your reading' wording. Three fix options: (A) neutral copy — edit Sanity defaults to 'Your Josephine sign-in link'. Cheapest, loses warmth. (B) context-aware — thread 'next' (or destination enum) into sendMagicLink, branch copy. (C) per-destination templates — emailMagicLinkListen / emailMagicLinkGiftAccess / emailMagicLinkReadings. Most flexibility, most schema churn. Trigger: UX session before apex unpark OR Becky requests differentiated copy.

name: Reading-price reconcile (Max + Josephine)
description: Pick canonical price per reading; sync Sanity (price cents + priceDisplay) + each Stripe Payment Link. Stripe Prices are immutable: create-new-Price → new-Payment-Link → swap URL on the reading doc → archive old. As of 2026-05-06: soul-blueprint price=17900/display=$129; birth-chart price=9900/display=$89; akashic-record price=7900/display=$89 all fail validation. Consider flipping schema rule warning → error after reconcile so future drift hard-fails Studio save.

name: docs/OPERATIONS.md — un-cancel procedure (D1 console)
description: Document Becky's un-cancel: direct D1 UPDATE setting gift_cancelled_at=NULL + gift_cancelled_by=NULL + gift_cancelled_reason=NULL on the specific submission id. Sanity-webhook→Worker→D1 path deliberately NOT built — single-purchaser-error path doesn't justify the surface.

name: Verify split — round-trip lands on staging only
description: Trigger a staging round-trip spec; confirm checkout.session.completed lands on staging worker. Confirm zero new rows in production Sanity. MUST close before Becky's first real reading.

name: Split Stripe test-mode webhook off production endpoint
description: Mirror-drift root cause (filed 2026-05-17): prod Stripe test-mode webhook endpoint registered against the prod Stripe account points at https://withjosephine.com/api/stripe/webhook. Round-trip specs trigger real Stripe Checkout, whose checkout.session.completed webhooks land on production worker → writes test data to production Sanity. Surfaced via Phase 5 Bundle A cleanup wiping 59 prod Sanity docs vs 6 actual D1 rows.

name: Rotate STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET on staging worker
description: pnpm exec wrangler secret put STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET --env staging with the new whsec_test_… value.

name: PR-E — Polish + final tests
description: P-6 motion preference (prefers-reduced-motion extends 5s confirm-armed window to 15s for WCAG 2.2.1 Timing Adjustable compliance); audit other refund mentions one more pass; /simplify full Phase 3 diff; close remaining ISC tally. ISC-18h Playwright iOS/Android device-emulation matrix lives here too if it doesn't get its own PR.

name: U4 — Hover affordance audit (cursor: pointer sweep)
description: Not all buttons have cursor: pointer on hover (flagged in J2). Design-system sweep across Button + anchor-styled-as-button + form-control wrappers. Mechanical pass.

name: New BACKLOG items surfaced 2026-05-24
description: Four items deferred during Sub-PR A ship close-out 2026-05-24. Three are post-Sub-PR-D cleanup; one is launch-adjacent UX.

name: U7 + U8 — Studio bundle (preview + claimed-at)
description: Bundle as one Studio-side PR; both touch deskStructure / preview / Presentation wiring.

name: brace-expansion 5.0.5 ReDoS CVE — minimatch upgrade
description: GHSA-jxxr-4gwj-5jf2 filtered in osv-scanner.toml because direct fix breaks toolchain. brace-expansion@5.0.5 MEDIUM ReDoS. Fixed in 5.0.6. Pinning via pnpm.overrides to ^5.0.6 breaks ESLint with TypeError: expand is not a function (minimatch@3.1.5 calling brace-expansion default export as function — broken by 5.0 export-shape change). Promotion path: (1) identify which dep pulls minimatch@3.1.5 (likely @eslint/config-array or vendored eslint plugin). (2) pin minimatch via pnpm.overrides to 9.x+. (3) re-add brace-expansion@<5.0.6: ^5.0.6 override. (4) verify pnpm install + lint + typecheck + test + build clean. (5) remove GHSA entry from osv-scanner.toml. Trigger: (a) CVE escalates MEDIUM → HIGH, (b) brace-expansion reachable from user input at runtime, (c) quarterly toolchain refresh.

name: R2 lifecycle on exports/ prefix (7d expiry)
description: GDPR Art. 20 export ZIPs accumulate without expiry policy. CF Dashboard → R2 → withjosephine-booking-photos → Settings → Object lifecycle rules → Add rule. Rule name: exports-7d-expiry. Prefix: exports/. Action: Delete uploaded objects after 7 Days. Enabled: ✓. Pre-signed download URLs already expire after 7 days; this rule garbage-collects underlying R2 objects so they don't keep counting against storage.

name: Cleanup staging test rows (Variant A/D residue)
description: Submission 67b20b5e-5d91-4dd9-9530-f902f7b3d827 used for Variant A/D walks 2026-05-24 (recipient mgertzen2@gmail.com, purchaser maxgertzen+variantA-purchaser). D1 was patched with bb5fe157's voice/pdf URLs for DeliveredSurface verification. Sweep with PREFIX="maxgertzen+variant" + any +variantC- rows. Same one-liner as the Epic 1 pre-prod cleanup but scoped to staging.

name: C5 — /api/booking/gift-redeem intermittent 400 root cause
description: Sub-PR γ (#163) added structured logging at every silent 400 branch. Next reproduction self-identifies which branch fired. Until then, a fix is speculation. Trigger: next 400 in wrangler tail emits a [gift-redeem] *_rejected log line, OR Max reports another mid-flow submit failure.

name: U5 — Gift-purchase form: prefill purchaser email
description: Gift purchase doesn't prefill purchaser email for repeat customers; standard purchase does. Lift the email-prefill mechanism from self-purchase entry into gift entry page. Quick-win sub-PR candidate alongside U3.

name: PR-D — D-11 cancel-scheduled
description: Per locked D-11 decision: POST /api/gifts/[id]/cancel-scheduled. Same auth pattern as send-now. Ordering: cancelGiftAlarm() FIRST → D1 UPDATE WHERE-guard → rowcount=0 → 409. UPDATE sets gift_cancelled_at, gift_cancelled_by, gift_cancelled_reason='purchaser-request'. CancelScheduledControl (5s confirm-armed, j-rose tint per Quiet Archivist — no alarm-red). Copy explicitly says 'non-refundable' per the wholesale-non-refundable policy locked in PR-B. 'cancelled' pill renders on card after success. docs/OPERATIONS.md updated with Becky's un-cancel procedure (D1 console only — Sanity-webhook→Worker→D1 path not built). Audit columns already exist (migration 0007 + 0012 — no D1 migration). Unblocked since PR-C-ii (PR #147) shipped.

name: U8 — Delivery countdown UI ("5 days left to deliver")
description: Countdown widget on the Submissions list/preview computed from giftClaimedAt + 7-day target.

name: Phase 3 scheduling — PR-D + PR-E (remaining sub-PRs)
description: Phase 3 scheduling rebuild — PR-A + PR-B + PR-C-i shipped 2026-05-19 (38/104 ISC complete). PRD: www/MEMORY/WORK/20260518-153700_scheduling-scrutiny-and-claudemd-reorg/PRD.md. Two sub-PRs remain.

name: Push branch + open PR
description: After audit + smoke pass: git push -u origin feat/phase-7-email-sanity-cms; gh pr create against main (or release/v1.2.0 — decide at push time based on where head is).

name: Re-evaluate @sentry/nextjs (BLOCKED upstream)
description: Blocked on sentry-javascript#18842 (AsyncLocalStorage bug affecting @sentry/nextjs onRequestError hook, which we deliberately avoided). Worth re-checking in 6 months; if resolved, @sentry/nextjs unlocks automatic request-context correlation that @sentry/cloudflare standalone doesn't provide.

name: Intake birth-details: 'I don't know my birth time' checkbox z-index
description: Checkbox on intake birth-details page sits on top of time picker / calendar picker inputs — picker is z-index under it, so clicking through to change time/date is blocked or visually obscured. Surfaced 2026-05-24 during gift-claim repro on staging. Fix surface: wrapper around conditional checkbox at birth-details step (search for time_unknown field key in src/components/IntakeForm/).

name: U7 — Studio preview of customer-facing pages
description: Becky can't preview booking / thank-you / listen / /my-gifts from inside Studio. Explore: extending Presentation Tool wiring OR a Sanity Studio plugin.

name: Paused workstream — Phase 7 PR-A1 (email Sanity CMS)
description: Branch feat/phase-7-email-sanity-cms exists locally with WIP commit f6568e9 on top of main d607ada (27 files, +972/-23). Code complete, quality gates clean (lint, typecheck, vitest 1472, build). Pause fully reversible (git branch -D feat/phase-7-email-sanity-cms). Resume: www/MEMORY/WORK/20260517-220000_phase-7-email-sanity-cms/PRD.md § Resume Instructions.

name: Parallel-safe non-blockers (queued)
description: Items that can ship anytime; not gating apex unpark. Each has its own trigger.

name: Apply mode — repair targeted rows
description: Re-points recipient_user_id for each flagged row from the dry-run CSV. Single transaction per submission. Idempotent: re-running on a repaired row no-ops. Invoke as: pnpm tsx scripts/repair-recipient-user-id.mts --apply --csv <path>.

name: Sub-PR D — Data repair script (scripts/repair-recipient-user-id.mts)
description: Repairs bb5fe157 and any other historically corrupted rows by re-pointing recipient_user_id from purchaser (5a72100c) → recipient mgertzen2 (1a87c68d). PRD Phase F. Verification step that closes hold-gate items #10 (U2) and #14 (U6).

name: Bundle-size narrowing of outputFileTracingExcludes
description: Deferred from PR #44. Hand-tuned excludes may now be over-broad; revisit when bundle size shows up as a regression.

name: Clarity provisioning checklist
description: (1) clarity.microsoft.com sign-up + create project → get 10-char tracking ID. (2) Add NEXT_PUBLIC_CLARITY_PROJECT_ID to GH repo Variables (no env-scoped override; same project for prod + staging). (3) Trigger production deploy so new build inlines env var. (4) DevTools-verify https://www.clarity.ms/tag/<id> loads without CSP errors. (5) Run set -a && source .env.local && set +a && pnpm tsx scripts/migrate-privacy-clarity.ts against both Sanity datasets (idempotent). (6) In Clarity dashboard, verify masking on real intake-form sessions — DOB / first_name / last_name / photo render as redacted blocks.

name: C3-b — /my-gifts empty listing (purchaser_user_id race at create time)
description: C3 'empty list' half: purchaser_user_id null on some gift rows. src/app/api/booking/gift/route.ts:239 calls getOrCreateUser({email, name}).catch(() => null) — transient user-resolve failure silently produces purchaser_user_id = NULL and the row never surfaces in /my-gifts. Trigger: (a) real customer reports empty /my-gifts after successful purchase, OR (b) routine D1 audit finds purchaser_user_id IS NULL AND is_gift = 1 AND status = 'paid' rows. Investigation: SELECT id, email, purchaser_user_id, recipient_user_id FROM submissions WHERE is_gift = 1 AND status = 'paid' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50. If any null, tighten the getOrCreateUser retry/backfill.

name: CancelScheduledControl component
description: 5s confirm-armed; j-rose tint per Quiet Archivist (NO alarm-red). Copy explicitly mentions 'non-refundable'. Renders cancelled pill on card after success.

name: Verify via sampling
description: Sanity: *[_type == "submission"] | order(_createdAt desc)[0..5] returns zero test entries. D1: SELECT id, email, created_at FROM submissions ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10 returns zero test entries.

name: Merge release/v1.2.0 → main
description: release/v1.2.0 cut from release/v1.1.0@882752d on 2026-05-20; carries v1.1.x + PRs #152-#173. Tag v1.2.0 at 94e9d5d. Merge unblocks main; the prod-D1-migration apply (T1_3) lands at the same window. Sequence: (1) confirm all hold-gate items above closed, (2) gh pr create merge release/v1.2.0 → main, (3) apply D1 migrations 0004→0012 in same window, (4) deploy production, (5) re-walk smoke against apex.

name: POST /api/gifts/[id]/cancel-scheduled route + auth + ordering
description: Mirror send-now's session-cookie auth pattern. WHERE-guard UPDATE on gift_cancelled_at IS NULL AND status IN ('paid', 'scheduled'). 409 on rowcount=0. cancelGiftAlarm() FIRST so a successful UPDATE never strands an alarm.

name: Operational Max-actions (no code)
description: Outstanding operational checklist from SESSION_BOOT § 'Outstanding Max-actions'. Items needing dashboard / CLI work without code change.

name: BREVO_API_KEY (gated on Brevo Phase 1 vetting)
description: DO NOT SET until Brevo Phase 1 vetting ticket #5354963 clears with Frosina. Without it, cascade reports 'brevo-contact: not configured' + 'brevo-smtp-log: not configured' partial-failures. Acceptable until Brevo Phase 1 ships — Brevo isn't carrying any customer data yet. wrangler secret put BREVO_API_KEY.

name: Brevo Phase 1 newsletter (post-launch)
description: De-blocked 2026-05-11 (was 'launch-blocking' earlier framing, not real on inspection). Transactional email continues through Resend; no newsletter form exists on site yet. Post-launch action: reply on Frosina's ticket #5354963 with (a) live URL withjosephine.com, (b) opt-in form URL when newsletter form ships, (c) sample newsletter (Becky drafts). Trigger to swap vendor: Brevo post-launch review drags >2 weeks OR rejects → switch to Beehiiv (~30 min code: write beehiivDelete.ts mirroring brevoDelete.ts shape + swap two import lines in cascadeDeleteUser.ts).

name: Sub-PR B — CheckEmailCard polish (deferred)
description: Not surfacing in field testing (per SESSION_BOOT). Originally intended to address state-confusion around the magic-link send affordance on the cold-visit listen page. Trigger to resume: any field report or smoke flag re-surfaces the confusion class.

name: D1 DELETE test rows
description: pnpm wrangler d1 execute withjosephine-bookings --remote --command "DELETE FROM submissions WHERE email LIKE '%@gmail.com' OR email LIKE '%@example.com' OR email LIKE 'gift-roundtrip-%' OR email LIKE 'stripe-roundtrip-%' OR email LIKE 'listen-roundtrip+%@withjosephine.com'" — broadened to cover Phase 5 Bundle A.0/A.1/A.2 seeds. Also sweep maxgertzen+variant prefix rows from 2026-05-24 (incl. submission 67b20b5e-5d91-4dd9-9530-f902f7b3d827 patched for DeliveredSurface verification).

name: ADMIN_API_KEY production secret
description: Gates the Sanity Studio 'Delete customer data' doc action via X-Admin-Token header. Without it, admin endpoint returns 404 to all callers and Becky can't cascade-delete. Generate locally: openssl rand -base64 32. Save to password manager BEFORE pasting into wrangler. wrangler secret put ADMIN_API_KEY.

name: Re-run smoke walkthrough (docs/MANUAL_SMOKE_TEST.md)
description: 11 journeys, ~60-90 min: J1 self-purchase (incl. Becky delivery + listen), J2 gift self-send, J3 gift recipient, J4 scheduled gift, J5 /my-gifts (send-now + cancel-scheduled + Studio editability), J7 privacy export, J8 contact, J9 Sanity Live, J10 mobile, J11 admin email checklist. Must come AFTER Sub-PR D ships (closes U2/U6 data-integrity). Send pass/fail + screenshots per ❌ + time window so maintainer can scope cleanup.

name: U2/U6 — Recipient-email lock + listen-page loop fix
description: Root-caused 2026-05-23 in PRD MEMORY/WORK/20260523-210824_u2-u6-recipient-email-lock-and-listen-loop/PRD.md. recipient_user_id corruption on bb5fe157 from getOrCreateUser({email: submittedEmail}) at gift-redeem/route.ts:260 with no integrity check that submittedEmail matches submission.recipient_email. Sub-PRs A (#169 forensic UA-hash), C (lock + 422 gate + NFKC, already shipped via PR #144), and Resend hardening cluster (#171/#172/#173) are SHIPPED. Sub-PR B (CheckEmailCard polish) deferred — not surfacing in field testing. Sub-PR D (data repair) is the only remaining piece. Blocks hold-gate item 10. Backlog refs L37-41 (U2) + L61-65 (U6).

name: Audit row write per repair
description: writeAudit({eventType: 'admin_action', success: true, actor: 'repair-script', submissionId, before, after}) — preserves who/what/when in deletion_log-equivalent admin audit trail.

name: Register test-mode webhook endpoint pointed at staging
description: Stripe Dashboard → Developers → Webhooks → test mode → Add endpoint → https://staging.withjosephine.com/api/stripe/webhook with same event set as the existing test-mode endpoint. Generate a separate signing secret (whsec_test_…).

name: MIXPANEL_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_USERNAME + SECRET
description: HTTP Basic auth pair from Mixpanel Project Settings → Service Accounts → 'Add Service Account' (role: Admin, US region, expires: Never). The 'Add' dialog shows username + secret ONCE — copy both immediately. Without these, cascade's Mixpanel data-deletions returns 'mixpanel: not configured' partial-failure and Mixpanel event/profile data is NOT deleted. Run: wrangler secret put MIXPANEL_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_USERNAME + wrangler secret put MIXPANEL_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_SECRET.

name: Pre-prod data cleanup (D1 + R2 + Sanity)
description: Wipe staging-test residue from production stores. Hard precondition before SANITY_BACKUP_ENABLED=1 (90-day Bucket Lock on backups/weekly/ would otherwise preserve test bookings). See runbooks/SANITY_BACKUP_RUNBOOK.md § 9b.

name: Apex unpark hold-gate
description: Launch-blocking items that gate apex DNS unpark + Stripe live-mode flip. Source: www/docs/SESSION_BOOT.md § Hold-gate. Closes the path from staging-only operation to real customer traffic. All items must clear before flipping NEXT_PUBLIC_UNDER_CONSTRUCTION = 0 and pasting sk_live_* into the worker.

name: U3 — Listen-page download filenames (Content-Disposition)
description: Voice-note + PDF downloads arrive with Sanity asset hashes as filenames. Should preserve original Sanity asset filename OR set readable default via Content-Disposition (e.g. soul-blueprint-voice-note.mp3). Fix surface: /api/listen/[id]/audio + /api/listen/[id]/pdf route handlers. Quick-win sub-PR candidate alongside U5.

name: Smoke-walk fix-arc deferrals (C3-b, C4-b, C5)
description: From 2026-05-21 smoke-walk arc (β/δ/α/γ Sub-PR sequence shipped 5 fixes; these 3 didn't ship — each with explicit promotion trigger). Source: www/MEMORY/WORK/20260521-smoke-walk/HANDOFF.md.

name: Promoted UX items — U3, U4, U5, U7, U8 (launch-blocking)
description: Promoted 2026-05-23 from BACKLOG to apex-unpark hold-gate items #11-#16. SESSION_BOOT ship order: U2 (loop, P0, in Epic 2) → U3/U5 quick-wins → U6 (merged into U2) → U4 sweep → U7+U8 Studio bundle.

name: Unit tests — happy + 409 already-fired + 409 already-cancelled
description: Three units covering the WHERE-guard branches.

name: End-to-end cascade smoke after secrets land
description: After ADMIN_API_KEY + Mixpanel pair both set: (1) Studio at withjosephine.sanity.studio/production. (2) Pick test submission doc (cascade is irreversible per Stripe Redaction). (3) 'Delete customer data' → type DELETE → paste admin token → 'Run cascade delete'. (4) Toast should say 'Customer data cascade complete' or list partial-failures (Brevo not-configured expected pre-vetting). (5) deletion_log in production D1 — expect TWO rows per user_id: started + completed with mixpanel_task_id + stripe_redaction_job_id non-null. (6) Mixpanel Project Settings → Data Deletion Requests shows pending/processing entry. (7) Stripe Dashboard → Settings → Privacy → Redaction Jobs shows validating → ready. (8) Re-trigger doc action on same submission → toast 'no recipient user' (idempotency).

name: C4-b — J3 claim/intake heading + listen-page greeting (Sanity schema)
description: Sub-PR δ (#161) closed the two thank-you surfaces. Remaining: (a) studio/schemas/giftIntakePage.ts headingWelcome field has no {recipientName} token → needs token + slot pass. (b) studio/schemas/listenPage.ts has no recipient-greeting field → needs new schema field + prop threading through ListenView. Trigger: next session touching Sanity copy schemas OR Becky asks to personalise either surface.

name: Set RESEND_E2E_DRY_RUN_SECRET on staging worker
description: Optional but recommended for hygiene — sandbox-prefix guard from PR #172 already plugs the leak, so no longer load-bearing. Run: openssl rand -hex 32 | pnpm exec wrangler secret put RESEND_E2E_DRY_RUN_SECRET --env staging. Paste same value into Settings → Secrets and variables → Actions → Environments → staging → STAGING_RESEND_E2E_DRY_RUN_SECRET. Both must be identical.

name: Rotate DO_DISPATCH_SECRET on staging
description: Exposed mid-diagnostic 2026-05-18. Command: openssl rand -hex 32 | pnpm exec wrangler secret put DO_DISPATCH_SECRET --env staging. After rotation, do not re-paste in chat.

name: Sanity Studio — delete mirrored test submission docs
description: Studio → Submissions → delete each test row that mirrored from the D1 deletes above.

name: Un-gate UA_AUDIT_HASH_DEPLOYED in sandbox CI
description: tests/e2e/specs/listen-roundtrip.spec.ts has test.skip(process.env.UA_AUDIT_HASH_DEPLOYED !== 'true', ...) on the 'link_issued audit row carries user_agent_hash' assertion. Gate added because staging precedes per-PR worker deploys. Now release/v1.2.0 carries Sub-PR A (364ea77) and staging is on new code; gate can come off. Either (a) set UA_AUDIT_HASH_DEPLOYED=true in .github/workflows/e2e-sandbox.yml env, OR (b) remove the test.skip line + helper env-var reference entirely.
